subcodes.first_line: O thou who art successful in divine guidance! Know that guidance is of diverse kinds. There is guidance through the tongue, which consisteth in acknowledgment and confession [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موفق بهدایت الهیه هدایت بر چند نوعست هدایت لسانست که اقرار و اعتراف بر
